no_data_current_only: We can see your current month data — forecasting needs at least 1 completed prior month. Keep using your POS and this will unlock automatically.
no_data_none: No sales data found yet. Keep recording sales and forecasts will appear automatically.
limited_data_warning: Forecast is based on only {n} month(s) of completed history — projections are an unreliable extrapolation. Accuracy will improve as more months of data accumulate (≥6 recommended).
revenue_forecast_sub: Actuals vs projected with confidence band
cash_runway_sub: Projected cash balance based on forecasted P&L
pnl_forecast_sub: Projected income statement for the next {n} months
pattern_sub: Automatically identified from your financial data
ask_ai_prompt: Patterns detected in my financials: {summary}. Based on these patterns, what should I do next?
pattern_stable_detail: Revenue is relatively flat — look for growth levers
pattern_seasonal_detail: {peaks} peak months and {troughs} troughs — plan inventory and cash accordingly
pattern_seasonal_detail_one_peak: {peaks} peak month and {troughs} troughs — plan inventory and cash accordingly
pattern_seasonal_detail_one_trough: {peaks} peak months and {troughs} trough — plan inventory and cash accordingly
pattern_seasonal_detail_one_each: {peaks} peak month and {troughs} trough — plan inventory and cash accordingly
pattern_compression_detail: Gross margin dropped from {start}% to {end}% — rising COGS or pricing pressure
pattern_expansion_detail: Gross margin improved from {start}% to {end}% — good cost control or pricing power
pattern_volatility_detail: Revenue varies significantly (CV: {n}%) — consider smoothing with subscriptions or retainers
